per_iteration.label: optimized SKILL.md
changes: Added 'Reading & Analyzing Spreadsheets' section with openpyxl load_workbook example showing how to skip summary/total rows
Added explicit rule: 'Use openpyxl for ALL operations. Do NOT use pandas.'
Added 'Including summary rows in analysis' to Common Mistakes section
Removed bundled template script reference (inlined template into SKILL.md instead)
Removed unreferenced files: scripts/create_xlsx.py, recalc.py, LICENSE.txt

root_cause: xlsx-analyze failed approval_rate because model used pandas which included the TOTAL summary row (row 26) in the count, computing 18/25=72% instead of 18/24=75%. Fix: added explicit guidance to use openpyxl and filter out summary rows.
